name: The Modern Defense as Black
description: A Black repertoire for the Modern Defense, drilled one position at a time: every card is a position with exactly one book move to find. Built from 5,000,000 rated games (Lichess database 2026-06, ratings 1600-2200): opponent replies branch by how often they are actually played, covering the most common 90% at each turn, so frequent lines run deep and rare sidelines stay shallow. 120 positions.
